'''dababa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doable|doable]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doable|doable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dababa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæbæbæth|dæbæbæth]] || [[word:dæbæbæj|dæbæbæj]] || [[word:dæbæbæsh|dæbæbæsh]] || [[word:dæbæbæ|dæbæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dabababath|dabababath]] || [[word:dabababaj|dabababaj]] || [[word:dabababash|dabababash]] || [[word:dabababa|dabababa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dababath|dababath]] || [[word:dababaj|dababaj]] || [[word:dababash|dababash]] || [[word:dababa|dababa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dabafbath|dabafbath]] || [[word:dabafbaj|dabafbaj]] || [[word:dabafbash|dabafbash]] || [[word:dabafbaf|dabafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dababatha|dababatha]] || [[word:dababaja|dababaja]] || [[word:dababasha|dababasha]] || [[word:dababaka|dababaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dababath|dababath]] || [[word:dababaj|dababaj]] || [[word:dababash|dababash]] || [[word:dababa|dababa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dababathal|dababathal]] || [[word:dababajal|dababajal]] || [[word:dababashal|dababashal]] || [[word:dababakal|dababakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dababathatha|dababathatha]] || [[word:dababajaja|dababajaja]] || [[word:dababashasha|dababashasha]] || [[word:dababaka|dababaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dababathan|dababathan]] || [[word:dababajan|dababajan]] || [[word:dababashan|dababashan]] || [[word:dababakan|dababakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dababathaoro|dababathaoro]] || [[word:dababajaoro|dababajaoro]] || [[word:dababashaoro|dababashaoro]] || [[word:dababakaoro|dababakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
